title: Better stair recipe
description: 2x2 crafting. Use 3 blocks to get 3 stairs.
body:
## Don't get ripped off when crafting stairs!

This presents a more fair aproach to stair crafting that matches the actual stair model one for one.

Same as in the stonecutter you now get **one stair for every one block you use**.  
Furthermore, Minecraft stairs have always had only two steps but the original crafting recipe uses _**three steps!**_ It makes no logistic sense!

![Bad > Good](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d8f0d109733d98e9e90031522fcc7f768a6b544.png)

Enjoy!  
Check my other mod **GrindLess** if you are interested in similar changes.         
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/grindless](https://modrinth.com/datapack/grindless)
